ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "geo_id2" TEXT /* Secondary identifier for geographic region */,
  "display_label" TEXT /* Human-readable label for the geographic region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic region's centroid */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the geographic region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the geographic region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "median_income_estimate" REAL /* Median household income in the past 12 months, adjusted for inflation */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the median income estimate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_updates table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_income_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_income_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographic_data ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the county was established */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the age distribution of the population */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_updates table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in percentage */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the racial distribution of the population */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing the education level distribution of the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in percentage */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_sources table */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the data_updates table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (geographic, income, demographic) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Census Bureau) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address to contact the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry that was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of what was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data entry before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data entry after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_income ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
